content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

No fix-now findings in the changed files. I reviewed the added tests in `tests/unit/milestone_store_integration_test.rs` and the test registration in `tests/unit.rs` against the milestone store, service, model, and fixture implementations in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs`, and `src/test_support/fixtures.rs`. The added test target passes as written (`cargo test --test unit milestone_store_integration_test`). I also ran `br lint`, which passed. `cargo clippy --test unit -- -D warnings` still fails on a pre-existing warning in `tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs:2891`, outside this diff.

## Amendments

None.
